calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-15-2017 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2017 Continued To Jan-03-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-16-2017 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT OPPENHEIMER & CO INC.'s DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT.

Defendant Oppenheimer & Co.'s demurrer to the first, second and third causes of action in the complaint filed by plaintiff Julianne Catalano is sustained without leave to amend as to all three causes of action. No opposition filed. Order is signed in Open Court. (see scanned order for details) Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Gordon Aiavao, CSR No: 11216, email: gaiavao@sftc.org. (D302)

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-16-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT/CROSS DEFENDANT OPPENHEIMER & CO INC.'S DEMURRER TO DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINT'S CROSS-COMPLAINT is Off calendar. A first amended cross-complaint was filed on October 2, 2017. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Gordon Aiavao, CSR No: 11216, email: gaiavao@sftc.org. (D302)
